name: Lemon Bites
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces container frozen non-dairy whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, egg, and whipped topping.
3. The batter will be very stiff. Drop by teaspoons into the sifted confectioner's sugar to coat.
4. Roll each portion into 1-inch balls, using the sugar to prevent sticking.
5. Place the balls of dough 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned on the bottom.
7. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
